title: Welcome Flow Refactor
summary: Eliminate confusing welcome screen. Replace with first-launch welcome folder, session restore, and minimal centered launcher.

user_stories.title: First Launch Detection
user_stories.description: Add hasLaunchedBefore UserDefaults flag to detect first-time users
acceptance_criteria: UserDefaults.standard.bool(forKey: "hasLaunchedBefore") returns false on first launch
Flag is set to true after welcome browser view appears
Deleting app data resets the flag

user_stories.title: First Launch Welcome Experience
user_stories.description: On first launch, open browser directly with Welcome folder and auto-select first file
acceptance_criteria: On first launch, browser window opens with bundled Welcome folder
Sidebar shows all 6 welcome files, folder auto-expanded
01-Welcome.md is auto-selected and displayed
No launcher/start window is shown
hasLaunchedBefore flag is set after view appears

user_stories.title: Session Restore on Launch
user_stories.description: Returning users get their last folder reopened automatically
acceptance_criteria: RecentFoldersManager.lastSessionFolder() returns most recent folder
On launch, attempt to resolve and open last session folder
If successful, browser opens directly (no launcher)
If folder unavailable, silently fall back to launcher

user_stories.title: Minimal Launcher View
user_stories.description: Simplified centered launcher with only folder shortcuts
acceptance_criteria: Launcher window is 480x520 pixels
Content is centered (not two-panel)
Shows Pixley photo, title, subtitle
Shows folder shortcuts: Desktop, Documents, Downloads, Choose Folder
Shows footer: or drop a folder anywhere
NO Ask Pixley section
NO recents list
Supports drag-and-drop

user_stories.title: Pixley Photo Easter Egg
user_stories.description: Click Pixley photo to reopen welcome tour
acceptance_criteria: Single-click on Pixley photo opens Welcome folder
Same behavior as current openWelcomeFolder()
No visible label or hint

user_stories.title: Auto-Show Launcher on Window Close
user_stories.description: App never has zero windows - launcher appears when browser closes
acceptance_criteria: Closing browser window shows minimal launcher
Closing folder via menu shows minimal launcher
Clicking dock icon when no windows shows launcher

user_stories.title: Update Welcome Content
user_stories.description: Update welcome markdown files to match new flow
acceptance_criteria: 01-Welcome.md does not mention start screen
Content reflects user is already viewing the app
03-Ask-Pixley.md updated for browser-only Ask Pixley
All welcome files reviewed for accuracy

phases.name: Foundation
phases.description: Add hasLaunchedBefore flag and lastSessionFolder() method

phases.name: Minimal Launcher
phases.description: Refactor StartView to centered single-column, handle window lifecycle

phases.name: First Launch Experience
phases.description: Implement first-launch welcome folder flow with auto-expand and auto-select

phases.name: Content Update
phases.description: Update welcome markdown files to match new flow
